text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Lumia. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Storm Titan into Shadow Specter.
I can evolve Shadow Specter into Celestial Chimera.
I can evolve Astral Minotaur into Infernal Basilisk.
I can evolve Infernal Basilisk into Crystal Manticore.
I can evolve Arcane Minotaur into Shadow Basilisk.
I can evolve Shadow Basilisk into Crystal Kraken.
I can evolve Void Titan into Storm Wyvern.
I can evolve Storm Wyvern into Arcane Tiger.
I can evolve Crystal Djinn into Void Wyvern.
I can evolve Void Wyvern into Crystal Serpent.
I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Solar Chimera.
I can evolve Solar Chimera into Thunder Manticore.
I can evolve Void Hydra into Arcane Titan.
I can evolve Arcane Titan into Solar Cyclops.
I can evolve Mystic Kraken into Arcane Golem.
I can evolve Arcane Golem into Celestial Hydra.
I can evolve Crystal Tiger into Shadow Leviathan.
I can evolve Shadow Leviathan into Ancient Phoenix.
I can evolve Mystic Specter into Infernal Wolf.
I can evolve Infernal Wolf into Storm Golem.
I can evolve Wild Owlbear into Ancient Chimera.
I can evolve Ancient Chimera into Infernal Specter.
I can evolve Solar Kraken into Storm Djinn.
I can evolve Storm Djinn into Frozen Minotaur.
I can evolve Void Cyclops into Thunder Titan.
I can evolve Thunder Titan into Crystal Tiger.
I can evolve Celestial Owlbear into Crystal Serpent.
I can evolve Crystal Serpent into Solar Titan.
I can evolve Thunder Djinn into Crystal Basilisk.
I can evolve Crystal Basilisk into Thunder Leviathan.
I can evolve Void Titan into Ancient Hydra.
I can evolve Ancient Hydra into Celestial Hydra.
I can evolve Arcane Hydra into Shadow Leviathan.
I can evolve Shadow Leviathan into Infernal Drake.
I can evolve Shadow Griffin into Thunder Wyvern.
I can evolve Thunder Wyvern into Arcane Drake.
I can evolve Infernal Kraken into Arcane Phoenix.
I can evolve Arcane Phoenix into Solar Tiger.
I can evolve Lunar Manticore into Lunar Phoenix.
I can evolve Lunar Phoenix into Mystic Tiger.
I can evolve Mystic Serpent into Ancient Griffin.
I can evolve Ancient Griffin into Mystic Phoenix.
I can evolve Solar Wolf into Celestial Basilisk.
I can evolve Celestial Basilisk into Wild Chimera.
I can evolve Ancient Wyvern into Astral Griffin.
I can evolve Astral Griffin into Frozen Titan.
I can evolve Mystic Golem into Celestial Minotaur.
I can evolve Celestial Minotaur into Mystic Golem.
I can evolve Lunar Manticore into Frozen Basilisk.
I can evolve Frozen Basilisk into Crystal Leviathan.
I can evolve Ancient Serpent into Thunder Djinn.
I can evolve Thunder Djinn into Frozen Djinn.
I can evolve Mystic Drake into Mystic Basilisk.
I can evolve Mystic Basilisk into Mystic Griffin.
I can evolve Frozen Kraken into Astral Chimera.
I can evolve Astral Chimera into Frozen Phoenix.
I can evolve Void Basilisk into Astral Djinn.
I can evolve Astral Djinn into Celestial Specter.
I can evolve Shadow Leviathan into Mystic Phoenix.
I can evolve Mystic Phoenix into Ancient Wolf.
Choose a beast evolution.
